Sadhana Feedback Logs
All Praise Suggestions Bugs
amaldhruv@amaldatt.com Praise
"Really beautiful, clean experience. The dark mode is extremely soothing for early morning recitation. The Sanskrit voice guides are very clear!"
June 26, 2026
svenmkt@gmail.com Suggestion
"Would love to have the full traditional dialogue of Vaishampayana/Yudhishthira at the beginning, or the full Phalashruti shlokas for completion."
June 27, 2026
vijaysrilata@gmail.com Bug
"The auto-advance mode seems to lag slightly on slide transition when screen lock is active on my Android 14 device. Chanting otherwise runs fine."
June 28, 2026
diptivilasa@yahoo.com Praise
"Absolutely love the Diya calendar! It is a great visual reminder to maintain my Nitya Sadhana. Chanting speed at 0.8x is perfect for my mother."
June 30, 2026

🔗 Link to Live Feedback
To load live feedback from your Google Form sheet automatically, export the Sheet as CSV and replace the array dynamically in your script:
fetch('YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_CSV_URL')
.then(res => res.text())
.then(csv => parseCSV(csv))
